description: Enrich README.md to a professional, comprehensive master README with table of contents, badges, experiment methodology section, architecture summary, quick start, test/CI instructions, and meta-prompting overview. Also create META-PROMPTS.md with reusable patterns extracted from AGENT_GUIDELINES.md and project conventions.
steps: Rewrite README.md with the following structure: (1) Title with badges (GitHub Actions CI status badge, CDK version badge, Java 17 badge, License badge), (2) Table of Contents with navigation links, (3) Project Overview explaining this is a TDD IaC experiment using AI-assisted development, (4) Architecture Summary with inline Mermaid diagram (simplified high-level) and link to ARCHITECTURE.md for details, (5) Quick Start section (prerequisites, clone, compile, test, synth, deploy), (6) Running Tests section with test categories table, (7) CI/CD Pipeline section, (8) Multi-Environment Configuration section, (9) Experiment Methodology section explaining issue-driven development, strict TDD rules, and AI-agent-driven workflow, (10) Meta-Prompting Patterns section with overview and link to META-PROMPTS.md, (11) Project Structure tree, (12) Contributing section linking to CONTRIBUTING.md, (13) Further Reading with links to all docs, (14) License section

Create META-PROMPTS.md at the project root with reusable meta-prompting patterns extracted from .github/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md and the project's development conventions. Structure it with: (1) Introduction explaining what meta-prompts are and how they drive agentic TDD IaC development, (2) Core Principles section (TDD-first, architecture-as-source-of-truth, conventional commits, defense-in-depth testing), (3) Reusable Prompt Templates section with templates for: new infrastructure construct, bug fix, refactor, documentation update - each showing the persona, constraints, workflow steps, and verification, (4) Agent Configuration section explaining how to adapt these patterns for different AI agents/tools, (5) Project-Specific Patterns section covering CDK Java testing patterns (Template.fromStack, ObjectMapper for Step Functions parsing, jsii IAM quirks), (6) Workflow Patterns section describing the issue-to-PR cycle used in this project, (7) Lessons Learned section with insights from building this project with AI agents
Ensure all internal links work (ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, SUMMARY.md, .github/AGENT_GUIDELINES.md, META-PROMPTS.md)

Review ARCHITECTURE.md - no structural changes are needed since no code is changing, so no diagram updates required. Add a link to META-PROMPTS.md in the Future Extensibility or top section if appropriate.
Verify the documentation changes do not break the build: run 'mvn test' and 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth' to confirm nothing is broken
acceptance_criteria: README.md contains a table of contents with clickable navigation links
README.md contains GitHub Actions CI badge, CDK version badge, Java badge, and License badge
README.md has a dedicated 'Experiment Methodology' section explaining issue-driven TDD with AI agents
README.md has a 'Meta-Prompting Patterns' section with link to META-PROMPTS.md
README.md has a Quick Start section with clear numbered steps
META-PROMPTS.md exists at project root with reusable prompt templates for at least 4 workflow types (new construct, bug fix, refactor, docs)
META-PROMPTS.md explains the TDD-first principle and architecture-as-source-of-truth pattern
META-PROMPTS.md includes CDK Java-specific testing patterns (Template.fromStack, jsii quirks)
All internal markdown links between docs resolve correctly
verification: Run 'mvn test' in the project root and confirm all tests pass
Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth' and confirm synthesis succeeds
findings: Build/test verification skipped: documentation-only change (README.md + META-PROMPTS.md). Environment has no network access to download Maven dependencies or Node packages, so mvn test and cdk synth cannot run. This does not affect correctness since no code files were modified. All internal markdown links verified to resolve correctly.
